---
title: "🏷️ Stickers"
description: "With Stickers, you can make your dots more visual and easy to follow. Use them to highlight important areas, mark what needs attention, or add a bit of personality to your screenshots. Stickers help your feedback stand out and stay organized." 

navigation: true
authors:

### 📝 How to use Stickers

🎨 Select the Stickers tool from your annotation toolbar.

🔖 Choose from arrows, labels, markers, or decorative stickers to match what you want to highlight.

📍 Click on your screenshot to place it exactly where you need attention.

📏 Drag to move it or resize it so the highlight is clear and easy to spot.

🧩 Layer or mix stickers to organize your feedback or emphasize different steps.

💾 Your updated screenshot is now ready to share, review, or keep in your library.


<template>
  <div class="border rounded-lg shadow-md mt-4 h-60">
    <iframe src="/quickstart-capture.png" class="rounded-lg w-full h-full" scrolling="no" frameborder="0"></iframe>

  </div>
</template>

💡 Tips

* Use stickers to show reactions or acknowledge comments quickly — for example: ✅ Approved, ⚠️ Needs attention, 🌟 Great idea!

* Combine stickers with annotations or emojis to reinforce your message visually.

* Keep stickers minimal to avoid cluttering your dot — 1–3 per screenshot is usually enough.

* Use stickers consistently across your team to make feedback quickly recognizable.
